sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 메드트로닉은 2026 회계연도 3분기 매출 90억 1,700만 달러를 기록하며 심혈관 부문 혁신 제품군을 중심으로 성장세를 지속했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 심혈관 부문에서 Micra 페이싱 포트폴리오와 PulseSelect 등 전기생리학(EP) 제품군의 글로벌 채택이 성장을 견인하고 있습니다.
연구개발(R&D) 비용은 7억 2,200만 달러로 전년 동기 6억 7,500만 달러 대비 증가하며 기술 혁신에 대한 투자를 확대했습니다.
글로벌 유동성 구조 변화로 인해 3개월간 이자 수익이 1억 200만 달러로 전년 동기 1억 1,400만 달러 대비 감소했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 글로벌 유동성 구조의 변화가 이자 수익 등 비영업적 재무 성과에 변동성을 초래할 위험이 있습니다.
심혈관 부문 성장이 특정 제품군(Micra, PulseSelect 등)의 지속적인 시장 수용도와 FDA 승인 이후의 채택 속도에 의존하고 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 심혈관 사업부에서 PulseSelect 및 Affera 매핑 시스템 등 혁신적인 전기생리학 포트폴리오의 시장 침투가 핵심 동인으로 작용 중입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 당기 매출은 90억 1,700만 달러, 영업이익은 14억 6,400만 달러를 기록했습니다.
순이익은 11억 4,300만 달러이며, 총자산은 914억 8,500만 달러 규모를 유지하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: R&D 투자 확대가 향후 매출 성장으로 이어지는지 여부와, 유동성 구조 변화에 따른 이자 수익 감소세가 재무 구조에 미칠 영향을 모니터링해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-01-23 revenue = 90억 1,700만 달러 (USD 9.017B; 9,017 million), XBRL range 2025-10-25..2026-01-23.
Quarter ended 2026-01-23 operating income = 14억 6,400만 달러 (USD 1.464B; 1,464 million), XBRL range 2025-10-25..2026-01-23.
Quarter ended 2026-01-23 net income = 11억 4,300만 달러 (USD 1.143B; 1,143 million), XBRL range 2025-10-25..2026-01-23.
Quarter ended 2026-01-23 total assets = 914억 8,500만 달러 (USD 91.485B; 91,485 million), XBRL range instant..2026-01-23.
Quarter ended 2026-01-23 cash and cash equivalents = 11억 4,700만 달러 (USD 1.147B; 1,147 million), XBRL range instant..2026-01-23.

Overview, looking ahead, we expect Cardiovascular could be affected by the following: • Continued global penetration of our Micra transcatheter pacing portfolio. • Continued acceptance and growth of the 3830 lead. • Global adoption and growth of Aurora EV-ICD. • Growth of the Cobalt and Crome portfolio of ICDs and CRT-Ds. • Continued growth and utilization of the TYRX Envelope for implantable devices. • Continued use and acceptance of Reveal LINQ and expansion of the LINQ II cardiac monitor. • Continued acceptance, adoption, and growth of our innovative portfolio of products in the electrophysiology (EP) segment, including the PulseSelect pulsed field ablation system and the Affera mapping and ablation system with Sphere-9 catheter. The Affera mapping and ablation system and Sphere-9 catheter received U.S. FDA approval in late October 2024. 43 • Continued growth and market acceptance of

Research and Development Expense We remain committed to deliver the best possible experiences for patients, physicians, and caregivers we serve; to create technologies that expand what’s possible across the human body to transform lives; to turn data and insights into real action to serve patient needs, improving care; and to expand healthcare access and deliver positive outcomes. Research and development expense for the three and nine months ended January 23, 2026 was $722 million and $2.2 billion, respectively, as compared to $675 million and $2.0 billion, respectively, for the corresponding periods in the prior fiscal year. Selling, General, and Administrative Expense Our goal is to continue to leverage selling, general, and administrative expense management initiatives. Operating Income, Net Other non-operating income, net includes the non-service component of net periodic pension and postretirement benefit cost, investment gains and losses, and interest income, which includes income on marketable debt securities, our global liquidity structures, and equity and other investments. Interest income for the three and nine months ended January 23, 2026 was $102 million and $310 million, respectively, as compared to $114 million and $364 million, respectively, for the corresponding periods in the prior fiscal year. The decrease in interest income was primarily driven by changes in our global liquidity structures.
